当前 lineage complete=0、missing=1571，metric status=blocked；未完整前指标保持 blocked/null。
非 ready 指标假零数量为 0；本报告未输出财务数值。

limitations: 报告仅包含 aggregate metadata 与 hash，不含账户标识、原始行或财务数值。
blocked/partial 状态不得解释为模型有效或完整财务结论。
数据质量报告只说明来源、lineage、覆盖与异常，不输出财务数值。
当前财务分析与人工判断使用 reviewed snapshot；缺失来源继续阻断。

boundaries_zh: 同一 source record 和同一 economic event/type 各只计一次。
投资入金与域内配置是不同活动阶段，必须拆分展示并显式解释。
退款必须唯一链接原事件，冲突或超额时失败关闭。
formula_drilldowns.definition_zh: 消费总流出按版本化广义活动口径汇总生活消费、投资入金、投资域内配置与金融费用，并按已关联退款抵消；各组件同源展示且不得解释为净资产损失。
formula_drilldowns.label_zh: 双消费与投资活动组件
formula_drilldowns.limitation: Published real events validate living consumption and investment allocation; unresolved transfer/refund pools prevent full funding/refund coverage.

boundaries_zh: 任一差异非精确零时失败关闭且不发布财务值。
投资入金或买入本身不是净资产损失。
Phase 5.2 只证明能力，真实数据不变量留给 Phase 5.3。
formula_drilldowns.definition_zh: 净资产等于现金、投资市值与其他资产之和减负债；现金按期初加流入减流出加调整滚动；投资重配置除显式费用外不得改变资产总额。
formula_drilldowns.label_zh: 净资产、现金与投资重配置不变量
formula_drilldowns.limitation: Account balance, liability, holding, price and FX snapshots are not loaded.

boundaries_zh: 分母为零时拖累率为 null，不伪造零。
生产结果必须绑定持仓、价格、成本、FX 和交易 lineage。
formula_drilldowns.definition_zh: 已实现净收益等于卖出收入减分摊成本、费用和税费；总净收益叠加未实现收益、分红和利息并扣持有成本，同时分别计算费用、税费、汇率与闲置现金拖累。
formula_drilldowns.limitation: Holdings, cost basis, point-in-time price, fee, tax and FX lineage are incomplete.

boundaries_zh: 至少一个负流和一个正流且日期不少于两个。
多次符号变化导致潜在多根时标记 blocked，不选择任意根。
无法括根或不收敛时失败关闭。
formula_drilldowns.definition_zh: 按实际日期和 365 日基准求解使投资现金流净现值为零的年化收益率；投资入金为负，回流、分红、利息和终值为正。
formula_drilldowns.limitation: No complete dated funding/return/terminal-value chain is available for real XIRR.

boundaries_zh: 无事件窗口返回 filtered_empty/null，不显示假零。
内部转账不改变体系外净现金流。
formula_drilldowns.definition_zh: 按 as_of 对去重经济事件计算 7、21、30、60、90、180、360 日外部流入、外部流出和净现金流，内部转账单列且不进入净现金流。
formula_drilldowns.limitation: Seven real lookback windows and empty-window false-zero boundaries pass; date precision remains daily.

boundaries_zh: L1 不超过 12、单个 L1 的 L2 不超过 5、总 L2 不超过 50。
每笔记录恰有一个主分类，多维维度使用标签。
停用标签保留历史但不得用于新分配。
formula_drilldowns.definition_zh: 分类保持 L1、L2 上限且每笔交易仅一个主分类；多维分析使用默认或自定义标签，保留停用历史并支持 all/any 视图筛选。
formula_drilldowns.limitation: Taxonomy structure passes, but classification accuracy lacks labels and out-of-sample ground truth.

counter_evidence: FORM-PFI-016..018 must remain blocked instead of inheriting the passing transaction-only evidence.
Taxonomy constraints do not prove classification accuracy without labels.
Consumer payload equality is not evidence of actual rendered UI/report parity.

formula_validation.limitation: Published real events validate living consumption and investment allocation; unresolved transfer/refund pools prevent full funding/refund coverage.
Account balance, liability, holding, price and FX snapshots are not loaded.
Holdings, cost basis, point-in-time price, fee, tax and FX lineage are incomplete.
No complete dated funding/return/terminal-value chain is available for real XIRR.
Seven real lookback windows and empty-window false-zero boundaries pass; date precision remains daily.
Taxonomy structure passes, but classification accuracy lacks labels and out-of-sample ground truth.

historical_out_of_sample_validation.reason: No complete target, labels and pre-specified split are available for a defensible historical or out-of-sample claim.

limitations: 1,936 source rows remain fail-closed in review and are excluded from published metrics.
The unresolved transfer pool prevents real validation of investment-funding activity.
Unlinked refunds cannot offset living consumption until explicit lineage exists.
Balance, liability, holding, price, fee, tax and FX sources required by core and investment formulas are not loaded.
Source time precision is daily; intraday ordering is not claimed.
正式 Stage 9 报告已分别渲染四个活动组件；公开证据只保存状态、lineage 与 hash。
真实金额仅在本机私有运行时显示，不写入 tracked evidence。

Consumer payload equality is not evidence of actual rendered UI/report parity.

公开 Evidence 不保存财务金额；本机私有运行时金额仍受同一 hash 与完整度门禁。
缺失输入继续保持 blocked/partial，不解释为零或完整财务结论。
